title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Life since the pandemic: How the COVID-19 pandemic experience has shaped public attitudes and beliefs on public health, infectious disease and vaccination Publication date: 16 May 2024 This publication showcases the findings from qualitative research done to better understand the drivers of public health behaviours and attitudes during the COVID-19 pandemic and how they have changed over time. Publication COVID-19 Public health

## Life since the pandemic: How the COVID-19 pandemic experience has shaped public attitudes and beliefs on public health, infectious disease and vaccination
This publication showcases the findings from qualitative research done to better understand the drivers of public health behaviours and attitudes during the COVID-19 pandemic and how they have changed over time.
- Rebalancing our food system Publication date: 16 May 2024 This independent report, prepared by the PHAC and published by the Ministry of Health, takes a public health focus, looking at changes to the food system that could help improve the health and wellbeing of people of New Zealand. Publication Nutrition Public Health Advisory Committee

## Rebalancing our food system
This independent report, prepared by the PHAC and published by the Ministry of Health, takes a public health focus, looking at changes to the food system that could help improve the health and wellbeing of people of New Zealand.
- Public Health Advisory Committee
- Revised Code of Practice for Industrial Radiography: ORS C7 Publication date: 8 May 2024 Last updated: 5 September 2025 Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act (the Act) 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety (the Director) is reviewing codes of practice. Codes of practice have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to Code of Practice for Industrial Radiography: ORS C7 (C7). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C7. Consultation Radiation safety

## Revised Code of Practice for Industrial Radiography: ORS C7
Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act (the Act) 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety (the Director) is reviewing codes of practice. Codes of practice have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to Code of Practice for Industrial Radiography: ORS C7 (C7). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C7.
- Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2022/23 Financial Year Report and inventory Publication date: 18 April 2024 This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry for the financial year 2022/23 (1 July 2022 to 30 June 2023). Publication About the Ministry Environmental health

## Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2022/23 Financial Year Report and inventory
This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry for the financial year 2022/23 (1 July 2022 to 30 June 2023).
- Environmental health
- Funding to Māori Health Providers 2018/19 to 2022/23 Publication date: 16 April 2024 This report shows information on funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health New Zealand – Te Whatu Ora and Te Aka whai Ora for the period 2018/19 to 2022/23. This report follows on from our reports in 2017, 2021 and 2022 on the same topic and is part of our monitoring of Whakamaua: Māori Health Action Plan 2020-2053. Publication Māori health Health system

## Funding to Māori Health Providers 2018/19 to 2022/23
This report shows information on funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health New Zealand – Te Whatu Ora and Te Aka whai Ora for the period 2018/19 to 2022/23. This report follows on from our reports in 2017, 2021 and 2022 on the same topic and is part of our monitoring of Whakamaua: Māori Health Action Plan 2020-2053.
- Proposed Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005): Summary of feedback from public consultation Publication date: 4 April 2024 This report summarises the themes from feedback received during the public consultation that took place between 17 January and 18 February 2024 on the amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005) (IHR). Publication Emergency management Public health

## Proposed Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005): Summary of feedback from public consultation
This report summarises the themes from feedback received during the public consultation that took place between 17 January and 18 February 2024 on the amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005) (IHR).
- Emergency management
- Proposed revised Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material: ORS C6 Publication date: 15 March 2024 Last updated: 15 September 2025 Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety is reviewing codes of practice. Codes of practice have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to ORS C6: Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material (C6). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C6. Consultation Radiation safety

## Proposed revised Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material: ORS C6
Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety is reviewing codes of practice. Codes of practice have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to ORS C6: Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material (C6). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C6.
- Proposed revised Code of Practice for Nuclear Medicine: ORS C2 for consultation Publication date: 14 March 2024 Last updated: 12 September 2025 Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety is reviewing codes of practice that have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to ORS C2: Code of Practice for Nuclear Security (C2). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C2. Consultation Radiation safety

## Proposed revised Code of Practice for Nuclear Medicine: ORS C2 for consultation
Following section 90(a) of the Radiation Safety Act 2016 the Director for Radiation Safety is reviewing codes of practice that have been issued under section 86(1) of the Act. Following a review, the Director has made amendments and revocations to ORS C2: Code of Practice for Nuclear Security (C2). Under section 89(2) the Director is consulting with persons likely to be affected by a proposed amendment or revocation to C2.
- Memorandum of Understanding between the Ministry of Health and the University of Waikato Publication date: 13 February 2024 The purpose of this Memorandum of Understanding is to commit the Parties to set out the work for the establishment of a third medical school at the University of Waikato. Publication Workforce

## Memorandum of Understanding between the Ministry of Health and the University of Waikato
The purpose of this Memorandum of Understanding is to commit the Parties to set out the work for the establishment of a third medical school at the University of Waikato.
- Joint Briefing to the Incoming Minister for Mental Health 2023 Publication date: 1 February 2024 Following the 2023 general election, the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora, Health New Zealand | Te Whatu Ora, and the Māori Health Authority | Te Aka Whai Ora together produced a Joint Briefing to the Incoming Minister for Mental Health. Publication Health system Mental health

## Joint Briefing to the Incoming Minister for Mental Health 2023
Following the 2023 general election, the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora, Health New Zealand | Te Whatu Ora, and the Māori Health Authority | Te Aka Whai Ora together produced a Joint Briefing to the Incoming Minister for Mental Health.
- Briefing to the Incoming Minister of Health November 2023 Publication date: 1 February 2024 Following the 2023 general election, the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora produced a briefing to the incoming Minister of Health, as is usual practice. Publication Health system

## Briefing to the Incoming Minister of Health November 2023
Following the 2023 general election, the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora produced a briefing to the incoming Minister of Health, as is usual practice.
- Compliance Guide for Veterinary Radiation Publication date: 20 December 2023 This publication provides guidance for people and organisations on meeting the requirements set out in the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 (ORS C9), the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C6 and the Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material: ORS C5. Publication Radiation safety

## Compliance Guide for Veterinary Radiation
This publication provides guidance for people and organisations on meeting the requirements set out in the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 (ORS C9), the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C6 and the Code of Practice for the Safe Transport of Radioactive Material: ORS C5.
- Te Mana Ola Engagement Report Publication date: 19 December 2023 The Te Mana Ola Engagement Report provides a summary of the knowledge and insights shared by Pacific peoples, throughout the Te Mana Ola engagement process. Publication Pacific health Public health

## Te Mana Ola Engagement Report
The Te Mana Ola Engagement Report provides a summary of the knowledge and insights shared by Pacific peoples, throughout the Te Mana Ola engagement process.
- Clinical Leadership in Manatū Hauora Publication date: 14 December 2023 This publication introduces clinical leadership as it applies to the work of the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora , including the definition and principles of clinical leadership in that context. Publication About the Ministry

## Clinical Leadership in Manatū Hauora
This publication introduces clinical leadership as it applies to the work of the Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora , including the definition and principles of clinical leadership in that context.
- Questionnaires and Content Guide 2022/23: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 14 December 2023 The questionnaires and content guide give information about the content of the adult and child surveys. Publication Statistics

The questionnaires and content guide give information about the content of the adult and child surveys.
